facebook.caption: Tourists walk straight past this place on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Big mistake. RASOI INDIAN PURE VEGETARIAN RESTAURANT is pulling 4.8 stars across 1,189 reviews and the line at lunch tells you everything. 100% vegetarian. Zero compromise on flavor. In the middle of Duong Dong Town. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
